arts.ttl: ‘Incredible’ Man Utd Star Eyed by Real Madrid for Shock Transfer

arts.ttl: Villarreal 1–2 Real Madrid: Player Ratings As Kylian Mbappe's Brace Inspires Comeback Victory
arts.sum: Two goals from Kylian Mbappé secured Real Madrid's 1–2 victory against Villarreal.

The Real Madrid team looked refreshed after their Champions League triumph midweek. Real Madrid managed to secure another important three points in the title race, momentarily putting them at the top of the tree.
